channel.title: Real AI Examples Blog
channel.description: Practical AI Blueprints, Recipes, and Guides for Operations, Marketing, and Sales.

item.title: Your Website is the Interface. Your API is the Future.
item.description: As AI agents become a primary way users consume data, your visual UI is no longer the only interface that matters.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The 'Anti-Slop' Rebrand: Jamming with Variant and Breaking My Own Logic
item.description: A raw look at how we rebranded this site using Variant.com, why I accidentally nuked the copy, and the reality of AI-generated aesthetics.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: How I built a 100+ API directory without hitting 'Loading...' screens
item.description: Modern websites often block simple scraping, making technical research difficult. Here is how Crawl4AI handles JS-heavy sites.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: How I Automated Instagram Direct Publishing (Without Paying for a Scheduler)
item.description: A step-by-step technical guide to building a custom Instagram auto-poster using Puppeteer, Cloudinary, and the Meta Graph API.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: Practical AI Automation: 50 Ideas from the Real Examples Library
item.description: Looking for high-impact automation opportunities? Here are 50 practical ideas pulled directly from our recipe library that you can implement today.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The 'Invisible' SEO Hack: Building an AI Internal Linking Agent
item.description: Manual internal linking is a soul-crushing chore. Here is how I built a Folder Agent to map my links automatically, so I never have to search for anchor text again.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The 'Smart' Way to Find High-Intent Keywords with Search Console
item.description: Stop manually checking keyword rankings. Here is how to use automation to pull your top-performing queries directly from Search Console into your own tools.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The 'Harden' Loop: How I Turn AI Experiments into Permanent Skills
item.description: Stop treating AI like a one-off chatbot. Here is the exact 'Discovery to Automation' loop I use to turn messy experiments into permanent skills that never fail.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The 'Lazy' Way to Build Your Own Google Analytics Reporter
item.description: Stop logging into Google Analytics. Here is the exact script I use to fetch my website's top pages directly in my terminal, without opening a single dashboard.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: Clawdbot (now OpenClaw) 101: What It Is and How to Install It (Updated Guide)
item.description: Clawdbot (also known as Moltbot or OpenClaw) is trending everywhere. From Name Change drama to critical safety fixes, Cloudflare edge hosting, and new $249 hardware.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The Marketer’s Guide to Professional Markdown: From Notes to Logic
item.description: Stop using Markdown as a basic notepad. Learn how to architect .md files that both humans and AI agents can execute with high accuracy.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The Tinkerer's Guide to Remotion: Building an Automated Video Factory
item.description: How can you use AI to build a programmatic video pipeline without writing code? A guide to turning your data into high-quality marketing assets.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: I Built a Viral Quiz in 3 Hours (And I Don't Know React)
item.description: I wanted a BuzzFeed-style personality quiz to segment my users. I didn't want to pay for Typeform or learn state management. So I hacked it together with AI.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: I Built a Headless Scraper That 'Fixes Itself' (Because I'm Lazy)
item.description: Maintaining 500+ screenshots is boring. I'm not a coder, so I 'hired' an AI agent to build a system that does the grunt work for me. Here's the messy truth of how it works.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: Cleaning Messy Data: I Turned 200 Junk Files into Gold in 10 Mins
item.description: I had 200 text files that were completely unusable. Instead of learning Regex (which I hate), I wrote a simple guide and let the AI do the boring work.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: State of AI 2026: The Year of the 'Folder Agent'
item.description: Why chatbots are dead for serious work, and why 'Folder Agents' like Claude Code and Gemini CLI are the future of Sales & Marketing operations.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The Hidden 'Backdoor' I Built for Free AI Traffic
item.description: Robots are reading your website. If you don't roll out the red carpet for them, they'll ignore you. Here's how I added a simple text file to get AI agents to recommend me.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The Infinite Content Engine: 1 Video to 10 Assets
item.description: I recorded a great podcast, got 500 views, and then it died. That felt like a waste. So I built a machine to force-feed that content into every other channel.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples

item.title: The Competitor Watchtower: Monitor Rivals on Autopilot
item.description: I found out my biggest competitor dropped their price by 20%... three weeks after they did it. I lost two deals because I didn't know. Never again.
item.author: Akhil from Real Examples
